---
title: "Pharmacy Type Counts"
format: html
---


```{python}
# load packages
# load packages
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from shapely import wkt
#import pydeck as pdk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import altair as alt
import streamlit as st
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
script_dir = Path(__file__).parent
```


```{python}
# load data
pharmacy = script_dir / '../data/raw-data/Pharmacy_Status_-_Historical_20260302.csv'
df_pharm = pd.read_csv(pharmacy)
```

```{python}
# explore data
print(df_pharm.shape)
df_pharm.head()
```

```{python}
# check pharmacy status
df_pharm['Status'].unique()

# create mapping for pharmacy status
mapping = {
    'OPEN':'Open',
    'CLOSED': 'Closed',
    'Permanently closed': 'Closed',
    'closed': 'Closed',
    'open': 'Open',
    'permanently closed': 'Closed',
    'unknown': 'Unknown'
}

# recode the status column
df_pharm['Status'] = df_pharm['Status'].replace(mapping)
```

```{python}
# make pharmacy names lowercase
df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'] = df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].str.lower()
```


```{python}
# explore pharmacy names
print(df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].unique())
```
 

```{python}
# recode pharmacy names

# create function
def recode_string(name):

    if 'walgreens' in name:
        return 'Walgreens Pharmacy'
    elif 'cvs' in name:
        return 'CVS Pharmacy'
    elif 'csco' in name:
        return 'Osco Pharmacy'
    elif 'costco' in name:
        return 'Costco Pharmacy'
    elif 'walmart' in name:
        return "Walmart Pharmacy"
    elif 'hospital' in name:
        return 'Hospital Pharmacy'
    elif "mariano's" in name:
        return "Mariano's Pharmacy"
    else:
        return 'Independent Pharmacy'

df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'] = df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].apply(recode_string)

print(df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].unique())
```

```{python}
# group pharmacies by name
pharm_grouped = df_pharm.groupby('Pharmacy Name').size()
pharm_grouped
```

```{python}
# move index into a column so altair can read it
pharm_grouped = df_pharm.groupby('Pharmacy Name').size().reset_index(name='Num Pharmacies')

# make a plot of common pharmacies
bars = alt.Chart(pharm_grouped).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('Num Pharmacies:Q', title='Pharmacy Total'),
    y=alt.Y('Pharmacy Name:N', title='Pharmacy Name', sort='-x')
).properties(
        width=400, 
        height=200 
)

text = bars.mark_text(\
    align='left',
    baseline='middle',
    dx=3
).encode(
    text='Num Pharmacies:Q'
)

chart = (bars + text).properties(
    title='Most Common Pharmacies in Chicago'
).configure_axis(
    labelFontSize=6,
    labelLimit=400
)

chart
```

```{python}
# save chart

# save chart as a png
chart.save('pharm_type.png')
```
